title: crinum × decandolei
intro: Crinum × decandolei, also known as the Decandole's Crinum, is a hybrid species of flowering plants in the family Amaryllidaceae, native to Madagascar. This plant contains alkaloids such as lycorine, which possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Crinum × decandolei include its potential to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts that can be used to treat various health conditions.
